ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Iteration number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the iteration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the iteration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the iteration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the iteration (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training process */,
  "training_start" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the training started */,
  "training_end" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the training ended */,
  "training_metrics" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional training metrics (e.g., loss, accuracy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the model */,
  "multi_class" REAL /* Multi-class performance metric */,
  "precision_class_0" REAL /* Precision for class 0 */,
  "precision_class_1" REAL /* Precision for class 1 */,
  "precision_class_2" REAL /* Precision for class 2 */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance record */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model for which the performance is recorded */,
  "iteration_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the iteration */,
  "training_loss" REAL /* Loss value during training */,
  "validation_loss" REAL /* Loss value during validation */,
  "training_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy during training */,
  "validation_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy during validation */,
  "additional_metrics" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional performance metrics (e.g., F1 score, recall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "multi_class_performance" (
  "multi_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each multi-class performance record */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration */,
  "multi_class_value" REAL /* Value of the multi-class performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the multi-class performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the multi-class performance record */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model for which the performance is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("multi_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multi_class_performance_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precision_metrics" (
  "precision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precision metric record */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class number */,
  "precision_value" REAL /* Value of the precision metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the precision metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the precision metric record */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model for which the precision is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precision_metrics_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access event was logged */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES model_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_iterations" (
  "version_iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version iteration */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Iteration number within the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the iteration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version iteration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version iteration */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training process */,
  "training_start" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the training started */,
  "training_end" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the training ended */,
  "training_metrics" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional training metrics (e.g., loss, accuracy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_iterations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_metrics" (
  "class_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class metric record */,
  "version_iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version iteration */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class number */,
  "precision_value" REAL /* Value of the precision metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the class metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the class metric record */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model for which the class metric is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_metrics_version_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_iteration_id") REFERENCES version_iterations ("version_iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_access_logs" (
  "version_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version access event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model version */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model version was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version access event was logged */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_access_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
